title: iria pilosa
intro: Iria pilosa, also known as the hairy iria or hairy iridoid, is a plant species that belongs to the family Gentianaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Iria pilosa include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Iria pilosa typically include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used in various forms to harness its medicinal properties.
